title: A Telescope Captures the Sun's Outer Layers

scenes.text: A telescope has revealed the Sun’s outer layers in unprecedented detail.
This telescope captures images of the Sun that are ten times sharper than previous efforts.
It also helps scientists better understand solar storms and their impact on Earth.
This could improve our prediction of space weather events.
scenes.label: IMPROVING SPACE WEATHER PREDICTION

scenes.text: Follow if curiosity runs your brain.

description: A new telescope is changing how we view the Sun. Its detailed images could revolutionize space weather forecasts. Follow for daily science!
